blurb.en: Across all three pools, AVAX-USD is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 79.1% from its peak, with RSI at the 2th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 99.0/100.
blurb.zh: 本期三個池子中，AVAX-USD 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 79.1%，RSI 百分位 2%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：99.0/100。

blurb.en: META has dipped 28.2% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 24th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 73.0/100.
blurb.zh: META 距 52 週高點下滑 28.2%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 24 百分位，動能明顯收縮。智能定投評分：73.0/100。

blurb.en: COIN is down 61.9% from its high, placing RSI at the 21th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our formula tends to find value. Entry score: 89.1/100.
blurb.zh: COIN 距高點下跌 61.9%，RSI 歷史百分位 21%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：89.1/100。

blurb.en: BNB-USD has pulled back 53.9% with RSI at the 5th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Not your typical recommendation. Smart DCA score: 97.4/100.
blurb.zh: BNB-USD 回撤 53.9%，RSI 百分位 5%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。非典型推薦，公式評分：97.4/100。
